description_long: This coupe car features a classic hot rod design with a compact, two-door body and a prominent, exposed engine at the front. The body is painted in a glossy gold color, complemented by large, red-rimmed wheels and thick black tires. Chrome exhaust pipes extend from the engine along both sides, adding to its aggressive, performance-oriented appearance. The windows are tinted black, and the roofline is a hardtop with a slight curve, giving it a vintage yet sporty silhouette. The front grille and headlights are integrated into the engine compartment, while the rear is simple and streamlined. The overall build suggests a lightweight, high-powered vehicle designed for speed and style.
description: A gold, vintage-style coupe car with an exposed engine, red-rimmed wheels, and chrome side exhausts, exuding a classic hot rod aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the exposed engine, chrome exhausts, and wide front tires.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the two-door coupe body, side exhaust pipes, and red-rimmed wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the simple back design, tinted rear window, and wide rear tires.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible engine details and exhaust pipes.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
